originalBehavior: The opening demo restarts automatically and lets readers change the multiplication rate, number of steps, and playback speed while the colored block layout updates.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original SimpleGrowth controller and directive inline, including the restart button, rate label updates, step cap logic, and animated block growth.
notes: The original rateLabel and otherRateLabels copy still come from the published Angular watcher.
No logic was extracted from the inline script for v1.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still exposes Restart, rate, steps, and speed controls above the simple-growth element.
Smoke coverage updates those controls locally and checks both the scope values and visible copy respond.

originalBehavior: The linear growth section restarts repeated addition and updates the plotted staircase according to its rate, steps, and speed controls.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published GrowthDemo directive and LinearGrowthDemo controller, with one local repair to the rate dropdown tag so the intended control is actually usable.
notes: The live HTML verified on 2026-03-14 ships this control as <selct>; the local route changes it to <select> without otherwise refactoring the section.
The local scroll wrapper only affects overflow behavior on smaller screens.
evidence: The published page still renders the linear section with restart, steps, and speed controls, but the rate control tag is misspelled in the live DOM.
Smoke coverage updates the repaired local dropdown and checks the controller state plus visible +rate markers update.

originalBehavior: The exponential growth section replays repeated multiplication and updates the plotted blocks, labels, and rate markers as controls change.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original ExponentialGrowthDemo controller and shared GrowthDemo directive, including the x-rate markers and animated block stacking.
notes: The local route preserves the original inline directive logic rather than extracting it to a separate asset.
The wide growth demo is wrapped for horizontal scrolling on narrow screens.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still exposes rate, steps, and speed controls above the exponential growth-demo element.
Smoke coverage updates those controls and checks the x-rate markers and scope values respond.

originalBehavior: The virus example restarts an infection simulation, updates the network canvas over time, and grows the infected-over-time chart deterministically from patient zero.
localStatus: The local route keeps the original canvas-plus-SVG virus demo, restart behavior, speed control, and infection history chart.
notes: The published toy model still seeds patient zero from the center-most visible node on restart.
The local route removes only surrounding promo surfaces, not the simulation logic.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still renders a virus-demo element with a restart button and speed slider.
Smoke coverage restarts the local virus model, waits for the infection history chart to regrow, and checks the scope speed updates.

originalBehavior: The published page included EV branding, author bylines, share widgets, newsletter prompts, analytics, and comments around the explainer.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell elements and uses the shared footer as the only live original-page reference surface.
notes: Technical provenance stays in docs only.
The public menu now routes back to the local replica index.
evidence: Public-surface auditing blocks creator names, EV branding, share widgets, newsletter embeds, analytics, and comments from shipping pages.
The local page keeps a single shared-footer reference link to the live original.
